description: Smooth curve interpolation through control points
utility: Create smooth curves through specified points

examples.scenario: Spline curve for ball trajectory with point at ratio
examples.expression: G = g2d(at(4,5), 26, 30, range(-2,10),type(plotting)); S = spline(G, point(G, 0, 8), point(G, 1, 6), point(G, 2, 3), point(G, 3, 0)); P = ratiopoint(G, S, t)
